description_long: This is a classic teapot with a rounded, bulbous body and a distinct spout and handle, both attached at opposite sides of the vessel. The teapot is positioned between two flat, wooden platforms, which serve as neutral display surfaces. The spout is short and slightly angled upward, while the handle is a thick, ornate loop with a comfortable grip. The body of the teapot is smooth and unadorned, with subtle horizontal banding that adds a touch of visual interest. The lid is present, slightly domed, and fits snugly into the top opening. The overall color is a uniform matte white, giving it a clean and minimalist appearance.
description: A rounded, matte white teapot with a short spout, ornate loop handle, and a domed lid, displayed between two wooden platforms. The design is smooth and unadorned, emphasizing simplicity and function.
description_view_0: Front view showing the spout on the right and the ornate handle on the left, with the teapot's rounded body clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the handle's attachment and the back curvature of the teapot, with the spout mostly hidden.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the spout on the left and the handle on the right, mirroring view 0 but from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the handle's structure and the back of the teapot, with the spout not visible.
attribute_spout_orientation: Short, straight spout angled slightly upward, positioned at the front of the teapot body.
attribute_handle_design: Thick, ornate loop handle with a rounded arch, attached at the upper and lower sides of the teapot for ergonomic grip.
attribute_lid_presence: Present; slightly domed lid with a snug fit.
